ModMetaData.name: Raids Within Reason
ModMetaData.author: SurpriZez
ModMetaData.description:
Raids Within Reason — overhauls RimWorld's raid logic to give enemies clear, context-aware objectives. Instead of generic destruction, raiders now have specific goals based on what they actually want from your colony.
Features: - Contextual Raid Goals: Raiders target valuables (Loot), specific colonists (Capture), vital rooms (Destroy), or specific pawns in blood feuds (Revenge). - Negotiation System: Hostile factions may send a negotiator first to make demands or announce their intent. Comply, refuse, or escalate. - Rescue Missions: Harm or arrest a negotiator to trigger high-intensity rescue raids. - Dynamic AI: Objectives integrate with standard raid types (Assault, Siege, Staged), making every encounter unique.
Developed by SurpriZez.
